name: stats
_note: Live boot reality: the reachable personas.stats is the Z4 thin wrapper (reads input.id; returns { ok, stats:{uses,installs,lastUsedAt,createdAt} }). No persona seeded -> ok:false (never no_db / never throws). The richer stats (rating distribution + isAuthor + chatCount) live in the currently-unwired server/domains/personas.js.
